items.title: BlackRock & Goldman Sachs Beat Q3 Expectations and Post Record AUM
items.description: BlackRock and Goldman Sachs helped highlight Tuesday's earnings lineup after exceeding their Q3 expectations and hitting records in assets under management (AUM).

items.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Profit Margin Surges to 27.5%, Reinforcing Bullish Community Narratives
items.description: Goldman Sachs (GS) posted a net profit margin of 27.5%, a notable rise from last year’s 23.1%, signaling a meaningful lift in profitability. Earnings leapt 38.2% over the past year, a sharp turnaround compared to the company’s five-year annual average earnings decline of 3.6% per year. Investors are likely to view the combination of stronger margins, substantial recent growth, and a comparatively low 15.5x Price-To-Earnings ratio as constructive, especially as the company’s rate of growth is...

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, Goldman, AMD, Walmart, J&J, Navitas, Polaris, and More
items.description: JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, and Goldman Sachs post quarterly earnings that top Wall Street estimates.
